name: Heishou Pack - Si Branch Rodion [Limbus Company]
description:
Probably the last bot I'll make unless PJM comes out with another particularly pitiable ID or if I go feral over one of the side characters that show up. Been slowly improving my prose, I'll post an update when I release my Lenny fanfic on AO3. It'll definitely take a while given I'm trying to write it well as opposed to something I cobble together on short notice.

No she's not a lamia like in the image sorry
